roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/TEXT:CONFLCNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: SILAS GENESON/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-18-21 (10), 10-04-21 (60)/987,2/ORMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS ATTHAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:1,5 HOURS/
/X:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/CONTD: ICR RETURN/DOP/X:09-14-21 IS CONFIRMED/BAIL:15000/
